para_trans: Tree felling for ease of industrial operation
Along with the application for permission
Documents to be attached 11 to 5
about doing it.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
Government Corrigendum No: TRS - 02/2026 Q. No.38 / F-6
4th Floor, Hall No., Madame Cama Marg,
Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Mumbai 400032,
Date: - 29 UM, 2026
Read: - 1) Government Decision No: - DIPP / TFTP / CR NO.21/F-6 dated 27th April, 2017
2) Letter from the Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Chief of Forest Force), State of Maharashtra No. No. (Protection) / Room-25 / Ownership / Q. No. 196/138/25 - 26 Dated 18.2.2026
The Proposal: -
A circular dated 27.4.2017 has been issued by the government for ease of doing business. The purge sheet was under the consideration of the government by amending this circular.
The clean-up:
1. To obtain permission for felling of trees under the Ease of Doing Business Industrial Facility vide circular dated 27.4.2017 issued by the Government.
Documents to be attached with the application as per Section 6 List of 11 Documents 11 to be attached below
As mentioned, 1) Paid copy of 7/12 with tree registration 2) 7/12 Consent letter from each with photo obtained from the bridge if there is more than one occupier on the site
3) Related Group / Saves / Geometric Number Map 4) Caste certificate of the competent authority if the applicant belongs to a Scheduled Tribe.
5) A letter of guarantee for planting a tree in lieu of a tree that has been cut down.
Accordingly, it is being made mandatory to attach 5 documents.

2. Sequence 7 followed by P.S. For industrial purpose - Proposal shall be expedited and tree felling permission shall be granted within 30 days period as a special case. Instead, it should read "For Industrial and Government project shall be expedited and tree felling permission shall be granted within 15 days as a special case after detailed scrutiny and verification." Further, the said Reference No. All other matters contained in the circular dated 27.4.2017 as per 1 shall stand accordingly.
Government Corrigendum No: TRS - 02/2026 Q. No.38 / F-6
This government certificate is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
